name: MoneyGram International, Inc.
description: MoneyGram International, Inc. is a global leader in the evolution of digital peer-to-peer payments. With a purpose-driven strategy to mobilize the movement of money, the company provides a modern, mobile, and API-driven platform that connects the world's digital and physical financial networks. MoneyGram enables consumers and businesses to send and receive money across borders seamlessly, affordably, and securely. By leveraging advanced technology, including blockchain and stablecoin integration, MoneyGram continues to transform cross-border finance, fostering financial inclusion and providing innovative payment solutions to millions of people and communities worldwide.
